revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月22日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[天慶]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[938年]][[6月22日]]） - [[承平 (日本)|承平]]より天慶に[[改元]] * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1333年]][[7月4日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]が滅亡。[[新田義貞]]が鎌倉に攻め込み[[北条高時]]ら一族約800人が自刃
== 誕生日 == * [[元文]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1737年]][[6月20日]]） - [[徳川家治]]、[[江戸幕府]]10代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1786年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1815年]][[6月29日]]） - [[浅田宗伯]]、[[漢方医]]・[[儒学者]]（+ [[1894年]]） * [[安政]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859年]][[6月22日]]） - [[坪内逍遙]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1935年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]]3年（ユリウス暦[[422年]][[6月27日]]） - 武帝（[[劉裕]]）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]]の初代[[皇帝]]（* [[356年]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3年（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条基時]]、鎌倉幕府13代[[執権]]（* [[1285年]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3年（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条高時]]、鎌倉幕府14代執権・9代[[得宗]]（* [[1303年]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3年（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]]、鎌倉幕府15代執権（* [[1278年]]） * [[暦応]]元年/[[延元]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1338年]][[6月10日]]） - [[北畠顕家]]、[[武将]]（* [[1318年]]） * [[天正]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1586年]][[7月8日]]） - [[蜂須賀正勝]]、武将（* [[1526年]]） * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1682年]][[6月27日]]） - [[池田光政]]、備前[[岡山藩]]主（* [[1609年]]） * [[宝永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1710年]][[6月18日]]） - [[河合曾良]]、[[俳人]]・[[蕉門十哲]]の一人（* [[1649年]]） * [[寛政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1799年]][[6月25日]]） - [[麻田剛立]]、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]]（* [[1734年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|21|5|23|4|22|6|5|0522}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月22日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[天慶]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[938年]][[6月22日]]） - [[承平 (日本)|承平]]より天慶に[[改元]] * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1333年]][[7月4日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]が滅亡。[[新田義貞]]が鎌倉に攻め込み[[北条高時]]ら一族約800人が自刃
== 誕生日 == * [[元文]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1737年]][[6月20日]]） - [[徳川家治]]、[[江戸幕府]]10代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1786年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1815年]][[6月29日]]） - [[浅田宗伯]]、[[漢方医]]・[[儒学者]]（+ [[1894年]]） * [[安政]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859年]][[6月22日]]） - [[坪内逍遙]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1935年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]]3年（ユリウス暦[[422年]][[6月27日]]） - 武帝（[[劉裕]]）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]]の初代[[皇帝]]（* [[356年]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3年（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条基時]]、鎌倉幕府13代[[執権]]（* [[1285年]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3年（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条高時]]、鎌倉幕府14代執権・9代[[得宗]]（* [[1303年]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3年（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]]、鎌倉幕府15代執権（* [[1278年]]） * [[暦応]]元年/[[延元]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1338年]][[6月10日]]） - [[北畠顕家]]、[[武将]]（* [[1318年]]） * [[天正]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1586年]][[7月8日]]） - [[蜂須賀正勝]]、武将（* [[1526年]]） * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1682年]][[6月27日]]） - [[池田光政]]、備前[[岡山藩]]主（* [[1609年]]） * [[宝永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1710年]][[6月18日]]） - [[河合曾良]]、[[俳人]]・[[蕉門十哲]]の一人（* [[1649年]]） * [[寛政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1799年]][[6月25日]]） - [[麻田剛立]]、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]]（* [[1734年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|21|5|23|4|22|6|5|0522}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]]

{{Lunar May}} {{Lunar May}} '''May 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar May}} ''May 22'''<!--Lunar May22--> is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]][[Category:友引]]である。
== Events == * [[天慶]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[938年]][[6月22日]]） - [[承平 (日本)|承平]]より天慶に[[改元]] * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1333年]][[7月4日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]が滅亡。[[新田義貞]]が鎌倉に攻め込み[[北条高時]]ら一族約800人が自刃
== Births == * [[元文]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1737年]][[6月20日]]） - [[徳川家治]]、[[江戸幕府]]10代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1786年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1815年]][[6月29日]]） - [[浅田宗伯]]、[[漢方医]]・[[儒学者]]（+ [[1894年]]） * [[安政]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859年]][[6月22日]]） - [[坪内逍遙]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1935年]]）
== Deaths == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]]3年（ユリウス暦[[422年]][[6月27日]]） - 武帝（[[劉裕]]）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]]の初代[[皇帝]]（* [[356年]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3年（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条基時]]、鎌倉幕府13代[[執権]]（* [[1285年]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3年（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条高時]]、鎌倉幕府14代執権・9代[[得宗]]（* [[1303年]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3年（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]]、鎌倉幕府15代執権（* [[1278年]]） * [[暦応]]元年/[[延元]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1338年]][[6月10日]]） - [[北畠顕家]]、[[武将]]（* [[1318年]]） * [[天正]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1586年]][[7月8日]]） - [[蜂須賀正勝]]、武将（* [[1526年]]） * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1682年]][[6月27日]]） - [[池田光政]]、備前[[岡山藩]]主（* [[1609年]]） * [[宝永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1710年]][[6月18日]]） - [[河合曾良]]、[[俳人]]・[[蕉門十哲]]の一人（* [[1649年]]） * [[寛政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1799年]][[6月25日]]） - [[麻田剛立]]、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]]（* [[1734年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|21|5|23|4|22|6|5|0522}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar May]][[sn:May 22日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:友引]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:May 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]]

revision.text:
{{Lunar May}} {{Lunar May}} '''May 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
<!--== {{Lunar May}} ''May 22'''<!--Lunar May22 is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]][[Category:友引]]である。
--> == Events == * [[天慶]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[938年]][[6月22日]]） - [[承平 (日本)|承平]]より天慶に[[改元]] * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1333年]][[7月4日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]が滅亡。[[新田義貞]]が鎌倉に攻め込み[[北条高時]]ら一族約800人が自刃
== Births == * [[元文]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1737年]][[6月20日]]） - [[徳川家治]]、[[江戸幕府]]10代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1786年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1815年]][[6月29日]]） - [[浅田宗伯]]、[[漢方医]]・[[儒学者]]（+ [[1894年]]） * [[安政]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859年]][[6月22日]]） - [[坪内逍遙]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1935年]]）
== Deaths == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]]3年（ユリウス暦[[422年]][[6月27日]]） - 武帝（[[劉裕]]）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]]の初代[[皇帝]]（* [[356年]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3年（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条基時]]、鎌倉幕府13代[[執権]]（* [[1285年]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3年（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条高時]]、鎌倉幕府14代執権・9代[[得宗]]（* [[1303年]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3年（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]]、鎌倉幕府15代執権（* [[1278年]]） * [[暦応]]元年/[[延元]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1338年]][[6月10日]]） - [[北畠顕家]]、[[武将]]（* [[1318年]]） * [[天正]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1586年]][[7月8日]]） - [[蜂須賀正勝]]、武将（* [[1526年]]） * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1682年]][[6月27日]]） - [[池田光政]]、備前[[岡山藩]]主（* [[1609年]]） * [[宝永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1710年]][[6月18日]]） - [[河合曾良]]、[[俳人]]・[[蕉門十哲]]の一人（* [[1649年]]） * [[寛政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1799年]][[6月25日]]） - [[麻田剛立]]、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]]（* [[1734年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|21|5|23|4|22|6|5|0522}}

== Deaths == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]]3年（ユリウス暦[[422年]][[6月27日]]） - 武帝（[[劉裕]]）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]]の初代[[皇帝]]（* [[356年]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3年（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条基時]]、鎌倉幕府13代[[執権]]（* [[1285年]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3年（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条高時]]、鎌倉幕府14代執権・9代[[得宗]]（* [[1303年]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3年（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]]、鎌倉幕府15代執権（* [[1278年]]） * [[暦応]]元年/[[延元]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1338年]][[6月10日]]） - [[北畠顕家]]、[[武将]]（* [[1318年]]） * [[天正]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1586年]][[7月8日]]） - [[蜂須賀正勝]]、武将（* [[1526年]]） * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1682年]][[6月27日]]） - [[池田光政]]、備前[[岡山藩]]主（* [[1609年]]） * [[宝永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1710年]][[6月18日]]） - [[河合曾良]]、[[俳人]]・[[蕉門十哲]]の一人（* [[1649年]]） * [[寛政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1799年]][[6月25日]]） - [[麻田剛立]]、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]]（* [[1734年]]）

revision.text:
[[sn:May 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] [[zh:五月廿二]] [[en:draft:May 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[天慶]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[938]][[6月22日]]） - [[承平 (日本)|承平]]より天慶に[[改元]] * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1333]][[7月4日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]が滅亡。[[新田義貞]]が鎌倉に攻め込み[[北条高時]]ら一族約800人が自刃
== Births == * [[元文]]2年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1737]][[6月20日]]） - [[徳川家治]]、[[江戸幕府]]10代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1786]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1815]][[6月29日]]） - [[浅田宗伯]]、[[漢方医]]・[[儒学者]]（+ [[1894]]） * [[安政]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859]][[6月22日]]） - [[坪内逍遙]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1935]]）
== Deaths == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]]3年（ユリウス暦[[422]][[6月27日]]） - 武帝（[[劉裕]]）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]]の初代[[皇帝]]（* [[356]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3年（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条基時]]、鎌倉幕府13代[[執権]]（* [[1285]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3年（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条高時]]、鎌倉幕府14代執権・9代[[得宗]]（* [[1303]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3年（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]]、鎌倉幕府15代執権（* [[1278]]） * [[暦応]]1st year/[[延元]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1338]][[6月10日]]） - [[北畠顕家]]、[[武将]]（* [[1318]]） * [[天正]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1586]][[7月8日]]） - [[蜂須賀正勝]]、武将（* [[1526]]） * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1682]][[6月27日]]） - [[池田光政]]、備前[[岡山藩]]主（* [[1609]]） * [[宝永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1710]][[6月18日]]） - [[河合曾良]]、[[俳人]]・[[蕉門十哲]]の一人（* [[1649]]） * [[寛政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1799]][[6月25日]]） - [[麻田剛立]]、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]]（* [[1734]]）

[[sn:May 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] [[zh:五月廿二]] [[en:draft:May 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[天慶]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[938]][[6月22日]]） - [[承平 (日本)|承平]]より天慶に[[改元]] * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3rd year（ユリウス暦[[1333]][[7月4日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]が滅亡。[[新田義貞]]が鎌倉に攻め込み[[北条高時]]ら一族約800人が自刃
== Births == * [[元文]]2nd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1737]][[6月20日]]） - [[徳川家治]]、[[江戸幕府]]10代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1786]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]12nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1815]][[6月29日]]） - [[浅田宗伯]]、[[漢方医]]・[[儒学者]]（+ [[1894]]） * [[安政]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859]][[6月22日]]） - [[坪内逍遙]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1935]]）
== Deaths == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]]3rd year（ユリウス暦[[422]][[6月27日]]） - 武帝（[[劉裕]]）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]]の初代[[皇帝]]（* [[356]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3rd year（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条基時]]、鎌倉幕府13代[[執権]]（* [[1285]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3rd year（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条高時]]、鎌倉幕府14代執権・9代[[得宗]]（* [[1303]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3rd year（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]]、鎌倉幕府15代執権（* [[1278]]） * [[暦応]]1st year/[[延元]]3rd year（ユリウス暦[[1338]][[6月10日]]） - [[北畠顕家]]、[[武将]]（* [[1318]]） * [[天正]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1586]][[7月8日]]） - [[蜂須賀正勝]]、武将（* [[1526]]） * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1682]][[6月27日]]） - [[池田光政]]、備前[[岡山藩]]主（* [[1609]]） * [[宝永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1710]][[6月18日]]） - [[河合曾良]]、[[俳人]]・[[蕉門十哲]]の一人（* [[1649]]） * [[寛政]]11th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1799]][[6月25日]]） - [[麻田剛立]]、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]]（* [[1734]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|21|5|23|4|22|6|5|0522}}

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:U]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:May 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] [[zh:五月廿二]] [[en:draft:May 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[天慶]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[938]][[6月22日]]） - [[承平 (日本)|承平]]より天慶に[[改元]] * [[正慶]]2年/[[元弘]]3rd year（ユリウス暦[[1333]][[7月4日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]が滅亡。[[新田義貞]]が鎌倉に攻め込み[[北条高時]]ら一族約800人が自刃
== Births == * [[元文]]2nd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1737]][[6月20日]]） - [[徳川家治]]、[[江戸幕府]]10代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1786]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]12nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1815]][[6月29日]]） - [[浅田宗伯]]、[[漢方医]]・[[儒学者]]（+ [[1894]]） * [[安政]]6th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1859]][[6月22日]]） - [[坪内逍遙]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1935]]）
== Deaths == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]]3rd year（ユリウス暦[[422]][[6月27日]]） - 武帝（[[劉裕]]）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]]の初代[[皇帝]]（* [[356]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3rd year（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条基時]]、鎌倉幕府13代[[執権]]（* [[1285]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3rd year（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条高時]]、鎌倉幕府14代執権・9代[[得宗]]（* [[1303]]） * 正慶2年/元弘3rd year（ユリウス暦1333年7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]]、鎌倉幕府15代執権（* [[1278]]） * [[暦応]]1st year/[[延元]]3rd year（ユリウス暦[[1338]][[6月10日]]） - [[北畠顕家]]、[[武将]]（* [[1318]]） * [[天正]]14th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1586]][[7月8日]]） - [[蜂須賀正勝]]、武将（* [[1526]]） * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1682]][[6月27日]]） - [[池田光政]]、備前[[岡山藩]]主（* [[1609]]） * [[宝永]]7th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1710]][[6月18日]]） - [[河合曾良]]、[[俳人]]・[[蕉門十哲]]の一人（* [[1649]]） * [[寛政]]11th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1799]][[6月25日]]） - [[麻田剛立]]、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]]（* [[1734]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|21|5|23|4|22|6|5|0522}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:May 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:May 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[Category:Lunar May]][[sn:May 22日 (旧暦)]]

revision.text:
[[sn:May 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] [[zh:五月廿二]] [[en:draft:May 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[天慶]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[938]][[6月22日]]） - [[承平 (日本)|承平]]より天慶に[[改元]] * [[Shōkyō]]2年/[[元弘]]3rd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1333]][[7月4日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]が滅亡。[[新田義貞]]が鎌倉に攻め込み[[北条高時]]ら一族約800人が自刃
== Births == * Genbun2nd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1737]][[6月20日]]） - [[徳川家治]]、[[江戸幕府]]10代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1786]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]12nd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1815]][[6月29日]]） - [[浅田宗伯]]、[[漢方医]]・[[儒学者]]（+ [[1894]]） * [[安政]]6th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1859]][[6月22日]]） - [[坪内逍遙]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1935]]）
== Deaths == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]]3rd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[422]][[6月27日]]） - 武帝（[[劉裕]]）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]]の初代[[皇帝]]（* [[356]]） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian Calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条基時]]、鎌倉幕府13代[[執権]]（* [[1285]]） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian Calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条高時]]、鎌倉幕府14代執権・9代[[得宗]]（* [[1303]]） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian Calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]]、鎌倉幕府15代執権（* [[1278]]） * [[暦応]]1st year/[[延元]]3rd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1338]][[6月10日]]） - [[北畠顕家]]、[[武将]]（* [[1318]]） * [[天正]]14th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1586]][[7月8日]]） - [[蜂須賀正勝]]、武将（* [[1526]]） * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2nd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1682]][[6月27日]]） - [[池田光政]]、備前[[岡山藩]]主（* [[1609]]） * [[宝永]]7th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1710]][[6月18日]]） - [[河合曾良]]、[[俳人]]・[[蕉門十哲]]の一人（* [[1649]]） * [[Kansei]]11th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1799]][[6月25日]]） - [[麻田剛立]]、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]]（* [[1734]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|21|5|23|4|22|6|5|0522}}

[[sn:May 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] [[zh:五月廿二]] [[en:draft:May 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkei|ja|天慶}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[938]] [[6月22日]] ） - [[承平 (日本)|承平]] より天慶に[[改元]] * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[7月4日]] ） - [[鎌倉幕府]] が滅亡。[[新田義貞]] が鎌倉に攻め込み[[北条高時]] ら一族約800人が自刃
== Births == * Genbun2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1737]] [[6月20日]] ） - [[徳川家治]] 、[[江戸幕府]] 10代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1786]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1815]] [[6月29日]] ） - [[浅田宗伯]] 、[[漢方医]] ・[[儒学者]] （+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1859]] [[6月22日]] ） - [[坪内逍遙]] 、[[小説家]] （+ [[1935]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[422]] [[6月27日]] ） - 武帝（[[劉裕]] ）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]] の初代[[皇帝]] （* [[356]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条基時]] 、鎌倉幕府13代[[執権]] （* [[1285]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条高時]] 、鎌倉幕府14代執権・9代[[得宗]] （* [[1303]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]] 、鎌倉幕府15代執権（* [[1278]] ） * [[暦応]] 1st year/[[延元]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[6月10日]] ） - [[北畠顕家]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1318]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1586]] [[7月8日]] ） - [[蜂須賀正勝]] 、武将（* [[1526]] ） * [[天和 (日本)|天和]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[6月27日]] ） - [[池田光政]] 、備前[[岡山藩]] 主（* [[1609]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[6月18日]] ） - [[河合曾良]] 、[[俳人]] ・[[蕉門十哲]] の一人（* [[1649]] ） * [[Kansei]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1799]] [[6月25日]] ） - [[麻田剛立]] 、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]] （* [[1734]] ）
== See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .

[[sn:May 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] [[zh:五月廿二]] [[en:draft:May 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkei|ja|天慶}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[938]] [[June 22]] ） - [[承平 (日本)|承平]] より天慶に[[改元]] * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[July 4]] ） - [[鎌倉幕府]] が滅亡。[[新田義貞]] が鎌倉に攻め込み[[北条高時]] ら一族約800人が自刃
== Births == * Genbun2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1737]] [[June 20]] ） - [[徳川家治]] 、[[江戸幕府]] 10代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1786]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1815]] [[June 29]] ） - [[浅田宗伯]] 、[[漢方医]] ・[[儒学者]] （+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1859]] [[June 22]] ） - [[坪内逍遙]] 、[[小説家]] （+ [[1935]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[422]] [[June 27]] ） - 武帝（[[劉裕]] ）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]] の初代[[皇帝]] （* [[356]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条基時]] 、鎌倉幕府13代[[執権]] （* [[1285]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条高時]] 、鎌倉幕府14代執権・9代[[得宗]] （* [[1303]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]] 、鎌倉幕府15代執権（* [[1278]] ） * [[暦応]] 1st year/[[延元]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[June 10]] ） - [[北畠顕家]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1318]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1586]] [[July 8]] ） - [[蜂須賀正勝]] 、武将（* [[1526]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[June 27]] ） - [[池田光政]] 、備前[[岡山藩]] 主（* [[1609]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[June 18]] ） - [[河合曾良]] 、[[俳人]] ・[[蕉門十哲]] の一人（* [[1649]] ） * [[Kansei]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1799]] [[June 25]] ） - [[麻田剛立]] 、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]] （* [[1734]] ）
== See Also ==

[[sn:May 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] [[zh:五月廿二]] [[en:draft:May 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkei|ja|天慶}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[938]] [[June 22]] ） - [[承平 (日本)|承平]] より天慶に[[改元]] * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[July 4]] ） - [[鎌倉幕府]] が滅亡。[[新田義貞]] が鎌倉に攻め込み[[北条高時]] ら一族約800人が自刃
== Births == * Genbun2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1737]] [[June 20]] ） - [[徳川家治]] 、[[江戸幕府]] 10代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1786]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1815]] [[June 29]] ） - [[浅田宗伯]] 、[[漢方医]] ・[[儒学者]] （+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1859]] [[June 22]] ） - [[坪内逍遙]] 、[[小説家]] （+ [[1935]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[422]] [[June 27]] ） - 武帝（[[劉裕]] ）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]] の初代[[皇帝]] （* [[356]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条基時]] 、鎌倉幕府13代[[執権]] （* [[1285]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条高時]] 、鎌倉幕府14代執権・9代[[得宗]] （* [[1303]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]] 、鎌倉幕府15代執権（* [[1278]] ） * [[暦応]] 1st year/[[延元]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[June 10]] ） - [[北畠顕家]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1318]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1586]] [[July 8]] ） - [[蜂須賀正勝]] 、武将（* [[1526]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[June 27]] ） - [[池田光政]] 、備前[[岡山藩]] 主（* [[1609]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[June 18]] ） - [[河合曾良]] 、[[俳人]] ・[[蕉門十哲]] の一人（* [[1649]] ） * [[Kansei]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1799]] [[June 25]] ） - [[麻田剛立]] 、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]] （* [[1734]] ）

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Null category]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:May 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] [[zh:五月廿二]] [[en:draft:May 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkei|ja|天慶}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[938]] [[June 22]] ） - [[承平 (日本)|承平]] より天慶に[[改元]] * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[July 4]] ） - [[鎌倉幕府]] が滅亡。[[新田義貞]] が鎌倉に攻め込み[[北条高時]] ら一族約800人が自刃
== Births == * Genbun2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1737]] [[June 20]] ） - [[徳川家治]] 、[[江戸幕府]] 10代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1786]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1815]] [[June 29]] ） - [[浅田宗伯]] 、[[漢方医]] ・[[儒学者]] （+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1859]] [[June 22]] ） - [[坪内逍遙]] 、[[小説家]] （+ [[1935]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[422]] [[June 27]] ） - 武帝（[[劉裕]] ）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]] の初代[[皇帝]] （* [[356]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条基時]] 、鎌倉幕府13代[[執権]] （* [[1285]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条高時]] 、鎌倉幕府14代執権・9代[[得宗]] （* [[1303]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]] 、鎌倉幕府15代執権（* [[1278]] ） * [[暦応]] 1st year/[[延元]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[June 10]] ） - [[北畠顕家]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1318]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1586]] [[July 8]] ） - [[蜂須賀正勝]] 、武将（* [[1526]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[June 27]] ） - [[池田光政]] 、備前[[岡山藩]] 主（* [[1609]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[June 18]] ） - [[河合曾良]] 、[[俳人]] ・[[蕉門十哲]] の一人（* [[1649]] ） * [[Kansei]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1799]] [[June 25]] ） - [[麻田剛立]] 、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]] （* [[1734]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|21|5|23|4|22|6|5|0522}}

[[sn:May 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] [[zh:五月廿二]] [[en:draft:May 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkei|ja|天慶}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[938]] [[June 22]] ） - [[承平 (日本)|承平]] より天慶に[[改元]] * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[July 4]] ） - [[鎌倉幕府]] が滅亡。[[新田義貞]] が鎌倉に攻め込み[[北条高時]] ら一族約800人が自刃
== Births == * Genbun2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1737]] [[June 20]] ） - [[徳川家治]] 、[[江戸幕府]] 10代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1786]] ） * [[Bunka]] 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1815]] [[June 29]] ） - [[浅田宗伯]] 、[[漢方医]] ・{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1859]] [[June 22]] ） - [[坪内逍遙]] 、[[小説家]] （+ [[1935]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[422]] [[June 27]] ） - 武帝（[[劉裕]] ）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]] の初代[[皇帝]] （* [[356]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条基時]] 、鎌倉幕府13代[[Shikken]] （* [[1285]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条高時]] 、鎌倉幕府14代Shikken・9代[[得宗]] （* [[1303]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]] 、鎌倉幕府15代Shikken（* [[1278]] ） * [[暦応]] 1st year/[[延元]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[June 10]] ） - [[北畠顕家]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1318]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1586]] [[July 8]] ） - [[蜂須賀正勝]] 、武将（* [[1526]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[June 27]] ） - [[池田光政]] 、備前[[岡山藩]] 主（* [[1609]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[June 18]] ） - [[河合曾良]] 、[[俳人]] ・[[蕉門十哲]] の一人（* [[1649]] ） * [[Kansei]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1799]] [[June 25]] ） - [[麻田剛立]] 、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]] （* [[1734]] ）
== See Also ==

[[sn:May 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] [[zh:五月廿二]] [[en:draft:May 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkei|ja|天慶}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[938]] [[June 22]] ） - [[承平 (日本)|承平]] より天慶に[[改元]] * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[July 4]] ） - [[鎌倉幕府]] が滅亡。[[新田義貞]] が鎌倉に攻め込み[[北条高時]] ら一族約800人が自刃
== Births == * Genbun2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1737]] [[June 20]] ） - [[徳川家治]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] 10代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1786]] ） * [[Bunka]] 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1815]] [[June 29]] ） - [[浅田宗伯]] 、[[漢方医]] ・{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1859]] [[June 22]] ） - [[坪内逍遙]] 、[[Novelist]] （+ [[1935]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[422]] [[June 27]] ） - 武帝（[[劉裕]] ）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]] の初代[[皇帝]] （* [[356]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条基時]] 、鎌倉幕府13代[[Shikken]] （* [[1285]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条高時]] 、鎌倉幕府14代Shikken・9代[[得宗]] （* [[1303]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]] 、鎌倉幕府15代Shikken（* [[1278]] ） * [[暦応]] 1st year/[[延元]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[June 10]] ） - [[北畠顕家]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1318]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1586]] [[July 8]] ） - [[蜂須賀正勝]] 、武将（* [[1526]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[June 27]] ） - [[池田光政]] 、備前[[岡山藩]] 主（* [[1609]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[June 18]] ） - [[河合曾良]] 、[[俳人]] ・[[蕉門十哲]] の一人（* [[1649]] ） * [[Kansei]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1799]] [[June 25]] ） - [[麻田剛立]] 、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]] （* [[1734]] ）

revision.comment: replacing jjawiki links
revision.text:
[[sn:May 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] [[zh:五月廿二]] [[en:draft:May 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkei|ja|天慶}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[938]] [[June 22]] ） - [[承平 (日本)|承平]] より天慶に[[改元]] * [[Shōkyō]] 2年/[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[July 4]] ） - [[鎌倉幕府]] が滅亡。[[Nitta Yoshisada]] が鎌倉に攻め込み[[北条高時]] ら一族約800人が自刃
== Births == * Genbun2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1737]] [[June 20]] ） - [[徳川家治]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] 10代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1786]] ） * [[Bunka]] 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1815]] [[June 29]] ） - [[浅田宗伯]] 、[[漢方医]] ・{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1859]] [[June 22]] ） - [[坪内逍遙]] 、[[Novelist]] （+ [[1935]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[422]] [[June 27]] ） - 武帝（[[劉裕]] ）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]] の初代[[Emperor]] （* [[356]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条基時]] 、鎌倉幕府13代[[Shikken]] （* [[1285]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条高時]] 、鎌倉幕府14代Shikken・9代[[得宗]] （* [[1303]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]] 、鎌倉幕府15代Shikken（* [[1278]] ） * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year/[[Engen]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[June 10]] ） - [[北畠顕家]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1318]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1586]] [[July 8]] ） - [[蜂須賀正勝]] 、武将（* [[1526]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[June 27]] ） - [[池田光政]] 、備前[[Okayama Domain]] 主（* [[1609]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[June 18]] ） - [[河合曾良]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] ・[[Shōmon Jūtetsu]] の一人（* [[1649]] ） * [[Kansei]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1799]] [[June 25]] ） - [[麻田剛立]] 、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]] （* [[1734]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|21|5|23|4|22|6|5|0522}}

== Deaths == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[422]] [[June 27]] ） - 武帝（[[劉裕]] ）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]] の初代[[Emperor]] （* [[356]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条基時]] 、鎌倉幕府13代[[Shikken]] （* [[1285]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条高時]] 、鎌倉幕府14代Shikken・9代[[得宗]] （* [[1303]] ） * Shōkyō2年/元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333年7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]] 、鎌倉幕府15代Shikken（* [[1278]] ） * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year/[[Engen]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[June 10]] ） - [[北畠顕家]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1318]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1586]] [[July 8]] ） - [[蜂須賀正勝]] 、武将（* [[1526]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[June 27]] ） - [[池田光政]] 、備前[[Okayama Domain]] 主（* [[1609]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[June 18]] ） - [[河合曾良]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] ・[[Shōmon Jūtetsu]] の一人（* [[1649]] ） * [[Kansei]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1799]] [[June 25]] ） - [[麻田剛立]] 、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]] （* [[1734]] ）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|天正}}" to "|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] [[zh:五月廿二]] [[en:draft:May 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkei|ja|天慶}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[938]] [[June 22]] ） - [[承平 (日本)|承平]] より天慶に[[改元]] * [[Shōkyō]] 2nd year /[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[July 4]] ） - [[Kamakura shogunate]] が滅亡。[[Nitta Yoshisada]] が鎌倉に攻め込み[[北条高時]] ら一族約800人が自刃
== Births == * Genbun2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1737]] [[June 20]] ） - [[徳川家治]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] 10代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1786]] ） * [[Bunka]] 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1815]] [[June 29]] ） - [[浅田宗伯]] 、[[漢方医]] ・{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1859]] [[June 22]] ） - [[坪内逍遙]] 、[[Novelist]] （+ [[1935]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[422]] [[June 27]] ） - 武帝（[[劉裕]] ）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]] の初代[[Emperor]] （* [[356]] ） * Shōkyō2nd year /元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333rd year 7月4日） - [[北条基時]] 、鎌倉幕府13代[[Shikken]] （* [[1285]] ） * Shōkyō2nd year /元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333rd year 7月4日） - [[北条高時]] 、鎌倉幕府14代Shikken・9代[[得宗]] （* [[1303]] ） * Shōkyō2nd year /元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333rd year 7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]] 、鎌倉幕府15代Shikken（* [[1278]] ） * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year/[[Engen]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[June 10]] ） - [[北畠顕家]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1318]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1586]] [[July 8]] ） - [[蜂須賀正勝]] 、武将（* [[1526]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[June 27]] ） - [[池田光政]] 、備前[[Okayama Domain]] 主（* [[1609]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[June 18]] ） - [[河合曾良]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] ・[[Shōmon Jūtetsu]] の一人（* [[1649]] ） * [[Kansei]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1799]] [[June 25]] ） - [[麻田剛立]] 、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]] （* [[1734]] ）== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|21|5|23|4|22|6|5|0522}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkei|ja|天慶}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[938]] [[June 22]] ） - [[承平 (日本)|承平]] より天慶に[[改元]] * [[Shōkyō]] 2nd year /[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[July 4]] ） - [[Kamakura shogunate]] が滅亡。[[Nitta Yoshisada]] が鎌倉に攻め込み[[北条高時]] ら一族約800人が自刃
== Births == * Genbun2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1737]] [[June 20]] ） - [[徳川家治]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] 10代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1786]] ） * [[Bunka]] 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1815]] [[June 29]] ） - [[浅田宗伯]] 、[[漢方医]] ・{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1859]] [[June 22]] ） - [[坪内逍遙]] 、[[Novelist]] （+ [[1935]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[422]] [[June 27]] ） - 武帝（[[劉裕]] ）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]] の初代[[Emperor]] （* [[356]] ） * Shōkyō2nd year /元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333rd year 7月4日） - [[北条基時]] 、鎌倉幕府13代[[Shikken]] （* [[1285]] ） * Shōkyō2nd year /元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333rd year 7月4日） - [[北条高時]] 、鎌倉幕府14代Shikken・9代[[得宗]] （* [[1303]] ） * Shōkyō2nd year /元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333rd year 7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]] 、鎌倉幕府15代Shikken（* [[1278]] ） * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year/[[Engen]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[June 10]] ） - [[北畠顕家]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1318]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1586]] [[July 8]] ） - [[蜂須賀正勝]] 、武将（* [[1526]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[June 27]] ） - [[池田光政]] 、備前[[Okayama Domain]] 主（* [[1609]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[June 18]] ） - [[河合曾良]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] ・[[Shōmon Jūtetsu]] の一人（* [[1649]] ） * [[Kansei]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1799]] [[June 25]] ） - [[麻田剛立]] 、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]] （* [[1734]] ） == See Also ==

revision.text:
[[sn:May 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] [[zh:五月廿二]] [[en:draft:May 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkei|ja|天慶}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[938]] [[June 22]] ） - [[承平 (日本)|承平]] より天慶に[[改元]] * [[Shōkyō]] 2nd year /[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[July 4]] ） - [[Kamakura shogunate]] が滅亡。[[Nitta Yoshisada]] が鎌倉に攻め込み[[北条高時]] ら一族約800人が自刃
== Births == * Genbun2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1737]] [[June 20]] ） - [[徳川家治]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] 10代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1786]] ） * [[Bunka]] 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1815]] [[June 29]] ） - [[浅田宗伯]] 、[[漢方医]] ・{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1859]] [[June 22]] ） - [[坪内逍遙]] 、[[Novelist]] （+ [[1935]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[422]] [[June 27]] ） - 武帝（[[劉裕]] ）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]] の初代[[Emperor]] （* [[356]] ） * Shōkyō2nd year /元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333rd year 7月4日） - [[北条基時]] 、鎌倉幕府13代[[Shikken]] （* [[1285]] ） * Shōkyō2nd year /元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333rd year 7月4日） - [[北条高時]] 、鎌倉幕府14代Shikken・9代[[得宗]] （* [[1303]] ） * Shōkyō2nd year /元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333rd year 7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]] 、鎌倉幕府15代Shikken（* [[1278]] ） * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year/[[Engen]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[June 10]] ） - [[北畠顕家]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1318]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1586]] [[July 8]] ） - [[蜂須賀正勝]] 、武将（* [[1526]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[June 27]] ） - [[池田光政]] 、備前[[Okayama Domain]] 主（* [[1609]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[June 18]] ） - [[河合曾良]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] ・[[Shōmon Jūtetsu]] の一人（* [[1649]] ） * [[Kansei]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1799]] [[June 25]] ） - [[麻田剛立]] 、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]] （* [[1734]] ） == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|21|5|23|4|22|6|5|0522}}

revision.text:
[[sn:May 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] [[zh:五月廿二]] [[en:draft:May 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkei|ja|天慶}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[938]] [[June 22]] ） - [[承平 (日本)|承平]] より天慶に[[改元]] * [[Shōkyō]] 2nd year /[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[July 4]] ） - [[Kamakura shogunate]] が滅亡。[[Nitta Yoshisada]] が鎌倉に攻め込み[[北条高時]] ら一族約800人が自刃
== Births == * Genbun2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1737]] [[June 20]] ） - [[徳川家治]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] 10代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1786]] ） * [[Bunka]] 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1815]] [[June 29]] ） - [[浅田宗伯]] 、[[漢方医]] ・{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1859]] [[June 22]] ） - [[坪内逍遙]] 、[[Novelist]] （+ [[1935]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[422]] [[June 27]] ） - 武帝（[[劉裕]] ）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]] の初代[[Emperor]] （* [[356]] ） * Shōkyō2nd year /元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333rd year 7月4日） - [[北条基時]] 、鎌倉幕府13代[[Shikken]] （* [[1285]] ） * Shōkyō2nd year /元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333rd year 7月4日） - [[北条高時]] 、鎌倉幕府14代Shikken・9代[[得宗]] （* [[1303]] ） * Shōkyō2nd year /元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333rd year 7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]] 、鎌倉幕府15代Shikken（* [[1278]] ） * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year/[[Engen]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[June 10]] ） - [[北畠顕家]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1318]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1586]] [[July 8]] ） - [[蜂須賀正勝]] 、武将（* [[1526]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[June 27]] ） - [[池田光政]] 、備前[[Okayama Domain]] 主（* [[1609]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[June 18]] ） - [[河合曾良]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] ・[[Shōmon Jūtetsu]] の一人（* [[1649]] ） * [[Kansei]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1799]] [[June 25]] ） - [[麻田剛立]] 、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]] （* [[1734]] ） == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|21|5|23|4|22|6|5|0522}}

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkei|ja|天慶}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[938]] [[June 22]] ） - [[承平 (日本)|承平]] より天慶に[[改元]] * [[Shōkyō]] 2nd year /[[元弘]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1333]] [[July 4]] ） - [[Kamakura shogunate]] が滅亡。[[Nitta Yoshisada]] が鎌倉に攻め込み[[北条高時]] ら一族約800人が自刃
== Births == * Genbun2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1737]] [[June 20]] ） - [[徳川家治]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] 10代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1786]] ） * [[Bunka]] 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1815]] [[June 29]] ） - [[浅田宗伯]] 、[[漢方医]] ・{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1894]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1859]] [[June 22]] ） - [[坪内逍遙]] 、[[Novelist]] （+ [[1935]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永初 (南朝宋)|永初]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[422]] [[June 27]] ） - 武帝（[[劉裕]] ）、[[宋 (南朝)|宋]] の初代[[Emperor]] （* [[356]] ） * Shōkyō2nd year /元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333rd year 7月4日） - [[北条基時]] 、鎌倉幕府13代[[Shikken]] （* [[1285]] ） * Shōkyō2nd year /元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333rd year 7月4日） - [[北条高時]] 、鎌倉幕府14代Shikken・9代[[得宗]] （* [[1303]] ） * Shōkyō2nd year /元弘3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] 1333rd year 7月4日） - [[北条貞顕]] 、鎌倉幕府15代Shikken（* [[1278]] ） * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year/[[Engen]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1338]] [[June 10]] ） - [[北畠顕家]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1318]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1586]] [[July 8]] ） - [[蜂須賀正勝]] 、武将（* [[1526]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[June 27]] ） - [[池田光政]] 、備前[[Okayama Domain]] 主（* [[1609]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1710]] [[June 18]] ） - [[河合曾良]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] ・[[Shōmon Jūtetsu]] の一人（* [[1649]] ） * [[Kansei]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1799]] [[June 25]] ） - [[麻田剛立]] 、[[日本の天文学者の一覧|天文学者]] （* [[1734]] ） == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|21|5|23|4|22|6|5|0522}}

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkei|ja|天慶|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[938]] {{ill|June 22|ja|6月22日}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Shōhei|ja|承平 (日本)|}} to {{ill|Tenkei|ja|天慶|12=draft}}. * [[Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[Genkō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1333]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}}) – The Kamakura shogunate was overthrown when [[Nitta Yoshisada]] attacked Kamakura, forcing about 800 members of the [[Hōjō]] clan, including {{ill|Hōjō Takatoshi|ja|北条高時}}, to commit suicide.

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkei|ja|天慶|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[938]] {{ill|June 22|ja|6月22日}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Shōhei|ja|承平 (日本)|}} to {{ill|Tenkei|ja|天慶|12=draft}}. * [[Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[Genkō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1333]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}}) – The Kamakura shogunate was overthrown when [[Nitta Yoshisada]] attacked Kamakura, forcing about 800 members of the [[Hōjō]] clan, including {{ill|Hōjō Takatoshi|ja|北条高時}}, to commit suicide.
== Births == * Genbun 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1737]] {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieharu|ja|徳川家治}}, the 10th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[1786]]). * [[Bunka]] 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1815]] {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日}}) – {{ill|Asada Sōhaku|ja|浅田宗伯}}, a physician of traditional Chinese medicine and Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft}}) (died [[1894]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1859]] {{ill|June 22|ja|6月22日}}) – {{ill|Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja|坪内逍遙}}, a novelist (died [[1935]]).
== Deaths == * [[Yōshō (Southern Song)|Yōshō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[422]] {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}}) – Emperor Wu of the Southern Song (【劉裕】), the first Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[356]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1333]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Motoki|ja|北条基時}}, the 13th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[1285]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1333]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Takatoshi|ja|北条高時}}, the 14th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate and 9th Detsū (born [[1303]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1333]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Sadakazu|ja|北条貞顕}}, the 15th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[1278]]). * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[Engen]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1338]] {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}}) – {{ill|Kitabatake Akiie|ja|北畠顕家}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}}) (born [[1318]]). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1586]] {{ill|July 8|ja|7月8日}}) – {{ill|Hachisuga Masakatsu|ja|蜂須賀正勝}}, a military commander (born [[1526]]). * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1682]] {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日}}) – {{ill|Ikeda Mitsumasa|ja|池田光政}}, lord of the Okayama Domain in Bizen (born [[1609]]). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1710]] {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}}) – {{ill|Kawai Sōrō|ja|河合曾良}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of Shōmon Jūtetsu (born [[1649]]). * [[Kansei]] 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1799]] {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日}}) – {{ill|Asada Gōritsu|ja|麻田剛立}}, an astronomer (born [[1734]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|21|5|23|4|22|6|5|0522}}

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkei|ja|天慶|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[938]] {{ill|June 22|ja|6月22日|12=draft}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Shōhei|ja|承平 (日本)||12=draft}} to {{ill|Tenkei|ja|天慶|12=draft|12=draft}}. * [[Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[Genkō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1333]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日|12=draft}}) – The Kamakura shogunate was overthrown when [[Nitta Yoshisada]] attacked Kamakura, forcing about 800 members of the [[Hōjō]] clan, including {{ill|Hōjō Takatoshi|ja|北条高時|12=draft}}, to commit suicide.
== Births == * Genbun 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1737]] {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieharu|ja|徳川家治|12=draft}}, the 10th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[1786]]). * [[Bunka]] 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1815]] {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Asada Sōhaku|ja|浅田宗伯|12=draft}}, a physician of traditional Chinese medicine and Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft|12=draft}}) (died [[1894]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1859]] {{ill|June 22|ja|6月22日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja|坪内逍遙|12=draft}}, a novelist (died [[1935]]).
== Deaths == * [[Yōshō (Southern Song)|Yōshō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[422]] {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日|12=draft}}) – Emperor Wu of the Southern Song (【劉裕】), the first Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[356]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1333]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Motoki|ja|北条基時|12=draft}}, the 13th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[1285]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1333]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Takatoshi|ja|北条高時|12=draft}}, the 14th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate and 9th Detsū (born [[1303]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1333]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Sadakazu|ja|北条貞顕|12=draft}}, the 15th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[1278]]). * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[Engen]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1338]] {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Kitabatake Akiie|ja|北畠顕家|12=draft}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}}) (born [[1318]]). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1586]] {{ill|July 8|ja|7月8日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hachisuga Masakatsu|ja|蜂須賀正勝|12=draft}}, a military commander (born [[1526]]). * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1682]] {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ikeda Mitsumasa|ja|池田光政|12=draft}}, lord of the Okayama Domain in Bizen (born [[1609]]). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1710]] {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Kawai Sōrō|ja|河合曾良|12=draft}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of Shōmon Jūtetsu (born [[1649]]). * [[Kansei]] revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenkei|ja|天慶|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[938]] {{ill|June 22|ja|6月22日|12=draft}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Shōhei|ja|承平 (日本)||12=draft}} to {{ill|Tenkei|ja|天慶|12=draft|12=draft}}. * [[Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[Genkō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1333]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日|12=draft}}) – The Kamakura shogunate was overthrown when [[Nitta Yoshisada]] attacked Kamakura, forcing about 800 members of the [[Hōjō]] clan, including {{ill|Hōjō Takatoshi|ja|北条高時|12=draft}}, to commit suicide.
== Births == * Genbun 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1737]] {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieharu|ja|徳川家治|12=draft}}, the 10th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[1786]]). * [[Bunka]] 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1815]] {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Asada Sōhaku|ja|浅田宗伯|12=draft}}, a physician of traditional Chinese medicine and Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft|12=draft}}) (died [[1894]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1859]] {{ill|June 22|ja|6月22日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja|坪内逍遙|12=draft}}, a novelist (died [[1935]]).
== Deaths == * [[Yōshō (Southern Song)|Yōshō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[422]] {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日|12=draft}}) – Emperor Wu of the Southern Song (【劉裕】), the first Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[356]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1333]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Motoki|ja|北条基時|12=draft}}, the 13th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[1285]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1333]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Takatoshi|ja|北条高時|12=draft}}, the 14th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate and 9th Detsū (born [[1303]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1333]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Sadakazu|ja|北条貞顕|12=draft}}, the 15th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[1278]]). * [[Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[Engen]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1338]] {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Kitabatake Akiie|ja|北畠顕家|12=draft}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}}) (born [[1318]]). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1586]] {{ill|July 8|ja|7月8日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hachisuga Masakatsu|ja|蜂須賀正勝|12=draft}}, a military commander (born [[1526]]). * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1682]] {{ill|June 27|ja|6月27日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ikeda Mitsumasa|ja|池田光政|12=draft}}, lord of the Okayama Domain in Bizen (born [[1609]]). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1710]] {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Kawai Sōrō|ja|河合曾良|12=draft}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of Shōmon Jūtetsu (born [[1649]]). * [[Kansei]] 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1799]] {{ill|June 25|ja|6月25日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Asada Gōritsu|ja|麻田剛立|12=draft}}, an astronomer (born [[1734]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|21|5|23|4|22|6|5|0522}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿二]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar May]] [[Category:Tomobiki]] [[Category:Days 22 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] }} [[sn:May 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 22일]] [[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:五月廿二]] [[en:draft:May 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:May 22日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:ay 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ar:May 22 (Lunisolar)]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 22일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿二]][[zh:五月廿二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839534]] Wikidata name: 22nd day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 22|qq=May 22}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tengyō|Tenkei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:938|938]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Jōhei|Shōhei]] to [[:en:Tengyō|Tenkei]]. * [[:en:Shōkyō|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – The Kamakura shogunate was overthrown when [[Nitta Yoshisada]] attacked Kamakura, forcing about 800 members of the [[:en:Later Hōjō clan|Later Hōjō clan]] clan, including [[:en:Hōjō Takatoki|Hōjō Takatoshi]], to commit suicide.
== Births == * Genbun 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieharu|Tokugawa Ieharu]], the 10th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[:en:1786|1786]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1815|1815]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – {{ill|Asada Sōhaku|ja|浅田宗伯|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asada Sōhaku|qq=|1=Asada Sōhaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560684}}, a physician of traditional Chinese medicine and Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|qq=|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – {{ill|Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja|坪内逍遙|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsubouchi Shōyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 坪内逍遥|1=Tsubouchi Shōyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q706196}}, a novelist (died [[:en:1935|1935]]).
== Deaths == * [[Yōshō (Southern Song)|Yōshō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:422|422]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – Emperor Wu of the Southern Song (【劉裕】), the first Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:356|356]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Mototoki|Hōjō Motoki]], the 13th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1285|1285]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Takatoki|Hōjō Takatoshi]], the 14th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate and 9th Detsū (born [[:en:1303|1303]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Sadaaki|Hōjō Sadakazu]], the 15th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1278|1278]]). * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1338|1338]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – [[:en:Kitabatake Akiie|Kitabatake Akiie]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1318|1318]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – [[:en:Hachisuka Masakatsu|Hachisuga Masakatsu]], a military commander (born [[:en:1526|1526]]). * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – [[:en:Ikeda Mitsumasa|Ikeda Mitsumasa]], lord of the Okayama Domain in Bizen (born [[:en:1609|1609]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1710|1710]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – {{ill|Kawai Sōrō|ja|河合曾良|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawai Sōrō|qq=|1=Kawai Sora|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141924}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of Shōmon Jūtetsu (born [[:en:1649|1649]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – [[:en:Asada Goryu|Asada Gōritsu]], an astronomer (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tengyō|Tenkei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:938|938]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Jōhei|Shōhei]] to [[:en:Tengyō|Tenkei]]. * [[:en:Shōkyō|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – The Kamakura shogunate was overthrown when [[Nitta Yoshisada]] attacked Kamakura, forcing about 800 members of the [[:en:Later Hōjō clan|Later Hōjō clan]] clan, including [[:en:Hōjō Takatoki|Hōjō Takatoshi]], to commit suicide.
== Births == * Genbun 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieharu|Tokugawa Ieharu]], the 10th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[:en:1786|1786]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1815|1815]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – {{ill|Asada Sōhaku|ja|浅田宗伯|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asada Sōhaku|qq=|1=Asada Sōhaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560684}}, a physician of traditional Chinese medicine and Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|qq=|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – {{ill|Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja|坪内逍遙|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsubouchi Shōyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 坪内逍遥|1=Tsubouchi Shōyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q706196}}, a novelist (died [[:en:1935|1935]]).
== Deaths == * [[Yōshō (Southern Song)|Yōshō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:422|422]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – Emperor Wu of the Southern Song (【劉裕】), the first Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:356|356]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Mototoki|Hōjō Motoki]], the 13th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1285|1285]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Takatoki|Hōjō Takatoshi]], the 14th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate and 9th Detsū (born [[:en:1303|1303]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Sadaaki|Hōjō Sadakazu]], the 15th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1278|1278]]). * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1338|1338]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – [[:en:Kitabatake Akiie|Kitabatake Akiie]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1318|1318]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – [[:en:Hachisuka Masakatsu|Hachisuga Masakatsu]], a military commander (born [[:en:1526|1526]]). * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – [[:en:Ikeda Mitsumasa|Ikeda Mitsumasa]], lord of the Okayama Domain in Bizen (born [[:en:1609|1609]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1710|1710]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – {{ill|Kawai Sōrō|ja|河合曾良|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawai Sōrō|qq=|1=Kawai Sora|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141924}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of Shōmon Jūtetsu (born [[:en:1649|1649]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – [[:en:Asada Goryu|Asada Gōritsu]], an astronomer (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).

Okayama Domain in Bizen (born [[:en:1609|1609]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1710|1710]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – {{ill|Kawai [[:en:1649|1649]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – [[:en:Asada Goryu|Asada Gōritsu]], an astronomer (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿二]][[zh:五月廿二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839534]] Wikidata name: 22nd day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 22|qq=May 22}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tengyō|Tenkei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:938|938]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Jōhei|Shōhei]] to [[:en:Tengyō|Tenkei]]. * [[:en:Shōkyō|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – The Kamakura shogunate was overthrown when [[Nitta Yoshisada]] attacked Kamakura, forcing about 800 members of the [[:en:Later Hōjō clan|Later Hōjō clan]] clan, including [[:en:Hōjō Takatoki|Hōjō Takatoshi]], to commit suicide.
== Births == * Genbun 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieharu|Tokugawa Ieharu]], the 10th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[:en:1786|1786]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1815|1815]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – {{ill|Asada Sōhaku|ja|浅田宗伯|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asada Sōhaku|qq=|1=Asada Sōhaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560684}}, a physician of traditional Chinese medicine and Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|qq=|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – {{ill|Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja|坪内逍遙|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsubouchi Shōyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 坪内逍遥|1=Tsubouchi Shōyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q706196}}, a novelist (died [[:en:1935|1935]]).
== Deaths == * [[Yōshō (Southern Song)|Yōshō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:422|422]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – Emperor Wu of the Southern Song (【劉裕】), the first Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:356|356]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Mototoki|Hōjō Motoki]], the 13th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1285|1285]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Takatoki|Hōjō Takatoshi]], the 14th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate and 9th Detsū (born [[:en:1303|1303]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Sadaaki|Hōjō Sadakazu]], the 15th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1278|1278]]). * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1338|1338]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – [[:en:Kitabatake Akiie|Kitabatake Akiie]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1318|1318]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – [[:en:Hachisuka Masakatsu|Hachisuga Masakatsu]], a military commander (born [[:en:1526|1526]]). * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – [[:en:Ikeda Mitsumasa|Ikeda Mitsumasa]], lord of the Okayama Domain in Bizen (born [[:en:1609|1609]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1710|1710]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – {{ill|Kawai Sōrō|ja|河合曾良|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawai Sōrō|qq=|1=Kawai Sora|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141924}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of Shōmon Jūtetsu (born [[:en:1649|1649]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – [[:en:Asada Goryu|Asada Gōritsu]], an astronomer (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).

== Births == * Genbun 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieharu|Tokugawa Ieharu]], the 10th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[:en:1786|1786]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1815|1815]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – {{ill|Asada Sōhaku|ja|浅田宗伯|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asada Sōhaku|1=Asada Sōhaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560684}}, a physician of traditional Chinese medicine and Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – {{ill|Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja|坪内逍遙|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 坪内逍遥|1=Tsubouchi Shōyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q706196}}, a novelist (died [[:en:1935|1935]]).
== Deaths == * [[Yōshō (Southern Song)|Yōshō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:422|422]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – Emperor Wu of the Southern Song (【劉裕】), the first Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:356|356]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Mototoki|Hōjō Motoki]], the 13th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1285|1285]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Takatoki|Hōjō Takatoshi]], the 14th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate and 9th Detsū (born [[:en:1303|1303]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Sadaaki|Hōjō Sadakazu]], the 15th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1278|1278]]). * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1338|1338]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – [[:en:Kitabatake Akiie|Kitabatake Akiie]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1318|1318]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – [[:en:Hachisuka Masakatsu|Hachisuga Masakatsu]], a military commander (born [[:en:1526|1526]]). * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – [[:en:Ikeda Mitsumasa|Ikeda Mitsumasa]], lord of the Okayama Domain in Bizen (born [[:en:1609|1609]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1710|1710]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – {{ill|Kawai Sōrō|ja|河合曾良|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawai Sōrō|1=Kawai Sora|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141924}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of Shōmon Jūtetsu (born [[:en:1649|1649]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – [[:en:Asada Goryu|Asada Gōritsu]], an astronomer (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).
