revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Matching pagename on wikidata]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿二]][[zh:五月廿二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839534]] Wikidata name: 22nd day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 22|qq=May 22}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tengyō|Tenkei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:938|938]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Jōhei|Shōhei]] to [[:en:Tengyō|Tenkei]]. * [[:en:Shōkyō|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – The Kamakura shogunate was overthrown when [[Nitta Yoshisada]] attacked Kamakura, forcing about 800 members of the [[:en:Later Hōjō clan|Later Hōjō clan]] clan, including [[:en:Hōjō Takatoki|Hōjō Takatoshi]], to commit suicide.
== Births == * Genbun 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieharu|Tokugawa Ieharu]], the 10th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[:en:1786|1786]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1815|1815]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – {{ill|Asada Sōhaku|ja|浅田宗伯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asada Sōhaku|1=Asada Sōhaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560684}}, a physician of traditional Chinese medicine and Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – {{ill|Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja|坪内逍遙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 坪内逍遥|1=Tsubouchi Shōyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q706196}}, a novelist (died [[:en:1935|1935]]).
== Deaths == * [[Yōshō (Southern Song)|Yōshō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:422|422]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – Emperor Wu of the Southern Song (【劉裕】), the first Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:356|356]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Mototoki|Hōjō Motoki]], the 13th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1285|1285]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Takatoki|Hōjō Takatoshi]], the 14th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate and 9th Detsū (born [[:en:1303|1303]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Sadaaki|Hōjō Sadakazu]], the 15th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1278|1278]]). * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1338|1338]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – [[:en:Kitabatake Akiie|Kitabatake Akiie]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1318|1318]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – [[:en:Hachisuka Masakatsu|Hachisuga Masakatsu]], a military commander (born [[:en:1526|1526]]). * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – [[:en:Ikeda Mitsumasa|Ikeda Mitsumasa]], lord of the Okayama Domain in Bizen (born [[:en:1609|1609]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1710|1710]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – {{ill|Kawai Sōrō|ja|河合曾良|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawai Sōrō|1=Kawai Sora|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141924}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of Shōmon Jūtetsu (born [[:en:1649|1649]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – [[:en:Asada Goryu|Asada Gōritsu]], an astronomer (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|21|5|23|4|22|6|5|0522|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tengyō|Tenkei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:938|938]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Jōhei|Shōhei]] to [[:en:Tengyō|Tenkei]]. * [[:en:Shōkyō|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – The Kamakura shogunate was overthrown when [[Nitta Yoshisada]] attacked Kamakura, forcing about 800 members of the [[:en:Later Hōjō clan|Later Hōjō clan]] clan, including [[:en:Hōjō Takatoki|Hōjō Takatoshi]], to commit suicide.
== Births == * Genbun 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieharu|Tokugawa Ieharu]], the 10th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[:en:1786|1786]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1815|1815]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – {{ill|Asada Sōhaku|ja|浅田宗伯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asada Sōhaku|1=Asada Sōhaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560684}}, a physician of traditional Chinese medicine and Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – {{ill|Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja|坪内逍遙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 坪内逍遥|1=Tsubouchi Shōyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q706196}}, a novelist (died [[:en:1935|1935]]).
== Deaths == * [[Yōshō (Southern Song)|Yōshō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:422|422]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – Emperor Wu of the Southern Song (【劉裕】), the first Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:356|356]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Mototoki|Hōjō Motoki]], the 13th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1285|1285]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Takatoki|Hōjō Takatoshi]], the 14th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate and 9th Detsū (born [[:en:1303|1303]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] == Deaths == * [[Yōshō (Southern Song)|Yōshō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:422|422]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – Emperor Wu of the Southern Song (【劉裕】), the first Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:356|356]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Mototoki|Hōjō Motoki]], the 13th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1285|1285]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Takatoki|Hōjō Takatoshi]], the 14th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate and 9th Detsū (born [[:en:1303|1303]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Sadaaki|Hōjō Sadakazu]], the 15th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1278|1278]]). * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1338|1338]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – [[:en:Kitabatake Akiie|Kitabatake Akiie]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1318|1318]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – [[:en:Hachisuka Masakatsu|Hachisuga Masakatsu]], a military commander (born [[:en:1526|1526]]). * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – [[:en:Ikeda Mitsumasa|Ikeda Mitsumasa]], lord of the Okayama Domain in Bizen (born [[:en:1609|1609]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1710|1710]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – {{ill|Kawai Sōrō|ja|河合曾良|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawai Sōrō|1=Kawai Sora|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141924}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of Shōmon Jūtetsu (born [[:en:1649|1649]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – [[:en:Asada Goryu|Asada Gōritsu]], an astronomer (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 22일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿二]][[zh:五月廿二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿二]][[zh:五月廿二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839534]] Wikidata name: 22nd day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 22|qq=May 22}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tengyō|Tenkei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:938|938]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Jōhei|Shōhei]] to [[:en:Tengyō|Tenkei]]. * [[:en:Shōkyō|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – The Kamakura shogunate was overthrown when [[Nitta Yoshisada]] attacked Kamakura, forcing about 800 members of the [[:en:Later Hōjō clan|Later Hōjō clan]] clan, including [[:en:Hōjō Takatoki|Hōjō Takatoshi]], to commit suicide.
== Births == * Genbun 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieharu|Tokugawa Ieharu]], the 10th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[:en:1786|1786]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1815|1815]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – {{ill|Asada Sōhaku|ja|浅田宗伯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asada Sōhaku|1=Asada Sōhaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560684}}, a physician of traditional Chinese medicine and Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – {{ill|Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja|坪内逍遙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 坪内逍遥|1=Tsubouchi Shōyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q706196}}, a novelist (died [[:en:1935|1935]]).
== Deaths == * [[Yōshō (Southern Song)|Yōshō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:422|422]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – Emperor Wu of the Southern Song (【劉裕】), the first Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:356|356]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Mototoki|Hōjō Motoki]], the 13th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1285|1285]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Takatoki|Hōjō Takatoshi]], the 14th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate and 9th Detsū (born [[:en:1303|1303]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Sadaaki|Hōjō Sadakazu]], the 15th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1278|1278]]). * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1338|1338]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – [[:en:Kitabatake Akiie|Kitabatake Akiie]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1318|1318]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – [[:en:Hachisuka Masakatsu|Hachisuga Masakatsu]], a military commander (born [[:en:1526|1526]]). * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – [[:en:Ikeda Mitsumasa|Ikeda Mitsumasa]], lord of the Okayama Domain in Bizen (born [[:en:1609|1609]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1710|1710]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – {{ill|Kawai Sōrō|ja|河合曾良|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawai Sōrō|1=Kawai Sora|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141924}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of Shōmon Jūtetsu (born [[:en:1649|1649]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – [[:en:Asada Goryu|Asada Gōritsu]], an astronomer (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|21|5|23|4|22|6|5|0522|qq=}}

[[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Sadaaki|Hōjō Sadakazu]], the 15th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1278|1278]]). * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1338|1338]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – [[:en:Kitabatake Akiie|Kitabatake Akiie]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1318|1318]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – [[:en:Hachisuka Masakatsu|Hachisuga Masakatsu]], a military commander (born [[:en:1526|1526]]). * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – [[:en:Ikeda Mitsumasa|Ikeda Mitsumasa]], lord of the Okayama Domain in Bizen (born [[:en:1609|1609]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1710|1710]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – {{ill|Kawai Sōrō|ja|河合曾良|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawai Sōrō|1=Kawai Sora|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141924}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of Shōmon Jūtetsu (born [[:en:1649|1649]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – [[:en:Asada Goryu|Asada Gōritsu]], an astronomer (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 22일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿二]][[zh:五月廿二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 22일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿二]][[zh:五月廿二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿二]][[zh:五月廿二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839534]] Wikidata name: 22nd day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 22|qq=May 22}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tengyō|Tenkei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:938|938]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Jōhei|Shōhei]] to [[:en:Tengyō|Tenkei]]. * [[:en:Shōkyō|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – The Kamakura shogunate was overthrown when [[Nitta Yoshisada]] attacked Kamakura, forcing about 800 members of the [[:en:Later Hōjō clan|Later Hōjō clan]] clan, including [[:en:Hōjō Takatoki|Hōjō Takatoshi]], to commit suicide.
== Births == * Genbun 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieharu|Tokugawa Ieharu]], the 10th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[:en:1786|1786]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1815|1815]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – {{ill|Asada Sōhaku|ja|浅田宗伯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asada Sōhaku|1=Asada Sōhaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560684}}, a physician of traditional Chinese medicine and Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – {{ill|Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja|坪内逍遙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 坪内逍遥|1=Tsubouchi Shōyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q706196}}, a novelist (died [[:en:1935|1935]]).
== Deaths == * [[Yōshō (Southern Song)|Yōshō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:422|422]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – Emperor Wu of the Southern Song (【劉裕】), the first Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:356|356]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Mototoki|Hōjō Motoki]], the 13th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1285|1285]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Takatoki|Hōjō Takatoshi]], the 14th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate and 9th Detsū (born [[:en:1303|1303]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Sadaaki|Hōjō Sadakazu]], the 15th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1278|1278]]). * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1338|1338]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – [[:en:Kitabatake Akiie|Kitabatake Akiie]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1318|1318]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – [[:en:Hachisuka Masakatsu|Hachisuga Masakatsu]], a military commander (born [[:en:1526|1526]]). * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – [[:en:Ikeda Mitsumasa|Ikeda Mitsumasa]], lord of the Okayama Domain in Bizen (born [[:en:1609|1609]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1710|1710]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – {{ill|Kawai Sōrō|ja|河合曾良|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawai Sōrō|1=Kawai Sora|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141924}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of Shōmon Jūtetsu (born [[:en:1649|1649]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – [[:en:Asada Goryu|Asada Gōritsu]], an astronomer (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tengyō|Tenkei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:938|938]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Jōhei|Shōhei]] to [[:en:Tengyō|Tenkei]]. * [[:en:Shōkyō|Shōkyō]] 2nd year / [[:en:Genkō|Genkō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – The Kamakura shogunate was overthrown when [[Nitta Yoshisada]] attacked Kamakura, forcing about 800 members of the [[:en:Later Hōjō clan|Later Hōjō clan]] clan, including [[:en:Hōjō Takatoki|Hōjō Takatoshi]], to commit suicide.
== Births == * Genbun 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1737|1737]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieharu|Tokugawa Ieharu]], the 10th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[:en:1786|1786]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1815|1815]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – {{ill|Asada Sōhaku|ja|浅田宗伯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asada Sōhaku|1=Asada Sōhaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560684}}, a physician of traditional Chinese medicine and Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – {{ill|Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja|坪内逍遙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 坪内逍遥|1=Tsubouchi Shōyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q706196}}, a novelist (died [[:en:1935|1935]]).
== Deaths == * [[Yōshō (Southern Song)|Yōshō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:422|422]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – Emperor Wu of the Southern Song (【劉裕】), the first Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:356|356]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Mototoki|Hōjō Motoki]], the 13th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1285|1285]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Takatoki|Hōjō Takatoshi]], the 14th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate and 9th Detsū (born [[:en:1303|1303]]). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Sadaaki|Hōjō Sadakazu]], the 15th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1278|1278]]). * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1338|1338]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – [[:en:Kitabatake Akiie|Kitabatake Akiie]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1318|1318]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – [[:en:Hachisuka Masakatsu|Hachisuga Masakatsu]], a military commander (born [[:en:1526|1526]]). * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – [[:en:Ikeda Mitsumasa|Ikeda Mitsumasa]], lord of the Okayama Domain in Bizen (born [[:en:1609|1609]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1710|1710]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – {{ill|Kawai Sōrō|ja|河合曾良|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawai Sōrō|1=Kawai Sora|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141924}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of Shōmon Jūtetsu (born [[:en:1649|1649]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – [[:en:Asada Goryu|Asada Gōritsu]], an astronomer (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|21|5|23|4|22|6|5|0522|qq=}}

[[:en:1333|1333]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Sadaaki|Hōjō Sadakazu]], the 15th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1278|1278]]). * [[:en:Ryakuō|Ryakuō]] 1st year / [[:en:Engen|Engen]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1338|1338]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – [[:en:Kitabatake Akiie|Kitabatake Akiie]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1318|1318]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 14th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1586|1586]] [[:en:July 8|July 8]]) – [[:en:Hachisuka Masakatsu|Hachisuga Masakatsu]], a military commander (born [[:en:1526|1526]]). * [[:en:Tenna|Tenna]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1682|1682]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) – [[:en:Ikeda Mitsumasa|Ikeda Mitsumasa]], lord of the Okayama Domain in Bizen (born [[:en:1609|1609]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1710|1710]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – {{ill|Kawai Sōrō|ja|河合曾良|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawai Sōrō|1=Kawai Sora|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141924}}, a haiku poet and one of the disciples of Shōmon Jūtetsu (born [[:en:1649|1649]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1799|1799]] [[:en:June 25|June 25]]) – [[:en:Asada Goryu|Asada Gōritsu]], an astronomer (born <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿二]][[zh:五月廿二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿二]][[zh:五月廿二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿二]][[zh:五月廿二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839534]] Wikidata name: 22nd day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 22|qq=May 22}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tengyō|en|Tengyō|WD=Q1327340|lt=Tenkei}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|938|en|938|WD=Q24794|lt=938}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|WD=Q2663|lt=June 22}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Jōhei|en|Jōhei|WD=Q1324874|lt=Shōhei}} to {{ill|Tengyō|en|Tengyō|WD=Q1327340|lt=Tenkei}}. * {{ill|Shōkyō|en|Shōkyō|WD=Q1069086|lt=Shōkyō}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō|en|Genkō|WD=Q844859|lt=Genkō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333}} {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|WD=Q2698|lt=July 4}}) – The Kamakura shogunate was overthrown when [[Nitta Yoshisada]] attacked Kamakura, forcing about 800 members of the {{ill|Later Hōjō clan|en|Later Hōjō clan|WD=Q431928|lt=Later Hōjō clan}} clan, including {{ill|Hōjō Takatoki|en|Hōjō Takatoki|WD=Q2355334|lt=Hōjō Takatoshi}}, to commit suicide.
== Births == * Genbun 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1737|en|1737|WD=Q6993|lt=1737}} {{ill|June 20|en|June 20|WD=Q2666|lt=June 20}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieharu|en|Tokugawa Ieharu|WD=Q437518|lt=Tokugawa Ieharu}}, the 10th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died {{ill|1786|en|1786|WD=Q7760|lt=1786}}). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1815|en|1815|WD=Q6948|lt=1815}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29}}) – {{ill|Asada Sōhaku|ja|浅田宗伯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asada Sōhaku|1=Asada Sōhaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560684}}, a physician of traditional Chinese medicine and Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died {{ill|1894|en|1894|WD=Q7843|lt=1894}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1859|en|1859|WD=Q7687|lt=1859}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|WD=Q2663|lt=June 22}}) – {{ill|Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja|坪内逍遙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 坪内逍遥|1=Tsubouchi Shōyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q706196}}, a novelist (died {{ill|1935|en|1935|WD=Q18658|lt=1935}}).

{{Not to be confused with|May 22|qq=May 22}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tengyō|en|Tengyō|WD=Q1327340|lt=Tenkei}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|938|en|938|WD=Q24794|lt=938}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|WD=Q2663|lt=June 22}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Jōhei|en|Jōhei|WD=Q1324874|lt=Shōhei}} to {{ill|Tengyō|en|Tengyō|WD=Q1327340|lt=Tenkei}}. * {{ill|Shōkyō|en|Shōkyō|WD=Q1069086|lt=Shōkyō}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō|en|Genkō|WD=Q844859|lt=Genkō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333}} {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|WD=Q2698|lt=July 4}}) – The Kamakura shogunate was overthrown when [[Nitta Yoshisada]] attacked Kamakura, forcing about 800 members of the {{ill|Later Hōjō clan|en|Later Hōjō clan|WD=Q431928|lt=Later Hōjō clan}} clan, including {{ill|Hōjō Takatoki|en|Hōjō Takatoki|WD=Q2355334|lt=Hōjō Takatoshi}}, to commit suicide.
== Births == * Genbun 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1737|en|1737|WD=Q6993|lt=1737}} {{ill|June 20|en|June 20|WD=Q2666|lt=June 20}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieharu|en|Tokugawa Ieharu|WD=Q437518|lt=Tokugawa Ieharu}}, the 10th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died {{ill|1786|en|1786|WD=Q7760|lt=1786}}). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1815|en|1815|WD=Q6948|lt=1815}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29}}) – {{ill|Asada Sōhaku|ja|浅田宗伯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asada Sōhaku|1=Asada Sōhaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560684}}, a physician of traditional Chinese medicine and Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died {{ill|1894|en|1894|WD=Q7843|lt=1894}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1859|en|1859|WD=Q7687|lt=1859}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|WD=Q2663|lt=June 22}}) – {{ill|Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja|坪内逍遙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 坪内逍遥|1=Tsubouchi Shōyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q706196}}, a novelist (died {{ill|1935|en|1935|WD=Q18658|lt=1935}}).
== Deaths == * [[Yōshō (Southern Song)|Yōshō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|422|en|422|WD=Q30906|lt=422}} {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27}}) – Emperor Wu of the Southern Song (【劉裕】), the first Emperor of the Song dynasty (born {{ill|356|en|356|WD=Q47937|lt=356}}). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333}} {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|WD=Q2698|lt=July 4}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Mototoki|en|Hōjō Mototoki|WD=Q2490704|lt=Hōjō Motoki}}, the 13th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born {{ill|1285|en|1285|WD=Q5546|lt=1285}}). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333}} {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|WD=Q2698|lt=July 4}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Takatoki|en|Hōjō Takatoki|WD=Q2355334|lt=Hōjō Takatoshi}}, the 14th Shikken of the Kamakura {{Not to be confused with|May 22|qq=May 22}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tengyō|en|Tengyō|WD=Q1327340|lt=Tenkei}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|938|en|938|WD=Q24794|lt=938}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|WD=Q2663|lt=June 22}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Jōhei|en|Jōhei|WD=Q1324874|lt=Shōhei}} to {{ill|Tengyō|en|Tengyō|WD=Q1327340|lt=Tenkei}}. * {{ill|Shōkyō|en|Shōkyō|WD=Q1069086|lt=Shōkyō}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō|en|Genkō|WD=Q844859|lt=Genkō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333}} {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|WD=Q2698|lt=July 4}}) – The Kamakura shogunate was overthrown when [[Nitta Yoshisada]] attacked Kamakura, forcing about 800 members of the {{ill|Later Hōjō clan|en|Later Hōjō clan|WD=Q431928|lt=Later Hōjō clan}} clan, including {{ill|Hōjō Takatoki|en|Hōjō Takatoki|WD=Q2355334|lt=Hōjō Takatoshi}}, to commit suicide.
== Births == * Genbun 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1737|en|1737|WD=Q6993|lt=1737}} {{ill|June 20|en|June 20|WD=Q2666|lt=June 20}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieharu|en|Tokugawa Ieharu|WD=Q437518|lt=Tokugawa Ieharu}}, the 10th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died {{ill|1786|en|1786|WD=Q7760|lt=1786}}). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1815|en|1815|WD=Q6948|lt=1815}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29}}) – {{ill|Asada Sōhaku|ja|浅田宗伯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asada Sōhaku|1=Asada Sōhaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560684}}, a physician of traditional Chinese medicine and Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died {{ill|1894|en|1894|WD=Q7843|lt=1894}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1859|en|1859|WD=Q7687|lt=1859}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|WD=Q2663|lt=June 22}}) – {{ill|Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja|坪内逍遙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 坪内逍遥|1=Tsubouchi Shōyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q706196}}, a novelist (died {{ill|1935|en|1935|WD=Q18658|lt=1935}}).
== Deaths == * [[Yōshō (Southern Song)|Yōshō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|422|en|422|WD=Q30906|lt=422}} {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27}}) – Emperor Wu of the Southern Song (【劉裕】), the first Emperor of the Song dynasty (born {{ill|356|en|356|WD=Q47937|lt=356}}). * Shōkyō 2nd year / Genkō 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333}} {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|WD=Q2698|lt=July 4}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Mototoki|en|Hōjō Mototoki|WD=Q2490704|lt=Hōjō {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tengyō|en|Tengyō|WD=Q1327340|lt=Tenkei|1=Tengyō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|938|en|938|WD=Q24794|lt=938|1=938}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|WD=Q2663|lt=June 22|1=June 22}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Jōhei|en|Jōhei|WD=Q1324874|lt=Shōhei|1=Jōhei}} to {{ill|Tengyō|en|Tengyō|WD=Q1327340|lt=Tenkei|1=Tengyō}}. * {{ill|Shōkyō|en|Shōkyō|WD=Q1069086|lt=Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō|en|Genkō|WD=Q844859|lt=Genkō|1=Genkō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333|1=1333}} {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|WD=Q2698|lt=July 4|1=July 4}}) – The Kamakura shogunate was overthrown when [[Nitta Yoshisada]] attacked Kamakura, forcing about 800 members of the {{ill|Later Hōjō clan|en|Later Hōjō clan|WD=Q431928|lt=Later Hōjō clan|1=Later Hōjō clan}} clan, including {{ill|Hōjō Takatoki|en|Hōjō Takatoki|WD=Q2355334|lt=Hōjō Takatoshi|1=Hōjō Takatoki}}, to commit suicide.
== Births == * Genbun 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1737|en|1737|WD=Q6993|lt=1737|1=1737}} {{ill|June 20|en|June 20|WD=Q2666|lt=June 20|1=June 20}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieharu|en|Tokugawa Ieharu|WD=Q437518|lt=Tokugawa Ieharu|1=Tokugawa Ieharu}}, the 10th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died {{ill|1786|en|1786|WD=Q7760|lt=1786|1=1786}}). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1815|en|1815|WD=Q6948|lt=1815|1=1815}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29|1=June 29}}) – {{ill|Asada Sōhaku|ja|浅田宗伯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asada Sōhaku|1=Asada Sōhaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560684}}, a physician of traditional Chinese medicine and Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died {{ill|1894|en|1894|WD=Q7843|lt=1894|1=1894}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1859|en|1859|WD=Q7687|lt=1859|1=1859}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|WD=Q2663|lt=June 22|1=June 22}}) – {{ill|Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja|坪内逍遙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 坪内逍遥|1=Tsubouchi Shōyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q706196}}, a novelist (died {{ill|1935|en|1935|WD=Q18658|lt=1935|1=1935}}).
== Deaths == * [[Yōshō (Southern Song)|Yōshō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|422|en|422|WD=Q30906|lt=422|1=422}} {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27|1=June 27}}) – Emperor Wu of the Southern Song (【劉裕】), the first Emperor of the Song dynasty (born {{ill|356|en|356|WD=Q47937|lt=356|1=356}}). * Shōkyō 2nd year / {{Not to be confused with|May 22|qq=May 22}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tengyō|en|Tengyō|WD=Q1327340|lt=Tenkei|1=Tengyō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|938|en|938|WD=Q24794|lt=938|1=938}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|WD=Q2663|lt=June 22|1=June 22}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Jōhei|en|Jōhei|WD=Q1324874|lt=Shōhei|1=Jōhei}} to {{ill|Tengyō|en|Tengyō|WD=Q1327340|lt=Tenkei|1=Tengyō}}. * {{ill|Shōkyō|en|Shōkyō|WD=Q1069086|lt=Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō|en|Genkō|WD=Q844859|lt=Genkō|1=Genkō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333|1=1333}} {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|WD=Q2698|lt=July 4|1=July 4}}) – The Kamakura shogunate was overthrown when [[Nitta Yoshisada]] attacked Kamakura, forcing about 800 members of the {{ill|Later Hōjō clan|en|Later Hōjō clan|WD=Q431928|lt=Later Hōjō clan|1=Later Hōjō clan}} clan, including {{ill|Hōjō Takatoki|en|Hōjō Takatoki|WD=Q2355334|lt=Hōjō Takatoshi|1=Hōjō Takatoki}}, to commit suicide.
== Births == * Genbun 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1737|en|1737|WD=Q6993|lt=1737|1=1737}} {{ill|June 20|en|June 20|WD=Q2666|lt=June 20|1=June 20}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieharu|en|Tokugawa Ieharu|WD=Q437518|lt=Tokugawa Ieharu|1=Tokugawa Ieharu}}, the 10th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died {{ill|1786|en|1786|WD=Q7760|lt=1786|1=1786}}). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1815|en|1815|WD=Q6948|lt=1815|1=1815}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29|1=June 29}}) – {{ill|Asada Sōhaku|ja|浅田宗伯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asada Sōhaku|1=Asada Sōhaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560684}}, a physician of traditional Chinese medicine and Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died {{ill|1894|en|1894|WD=Q7843|lt=1894|1=1894}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1859|en|1859|WD=Q7687|lt=1859|1=1859}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|WD=Q2663|lt=June 22|1=June 22}}) – {{ill|Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja|坪内逍遙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 坪内逍遥|1=Tsubouchi Shōyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q706196}}, a novelist (died {{ill|1935|en|1935|WD=Q18658|lt=1935|1=1935}}).
== Deaths == * [[Yōshō (Southern Song)|Yōshō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|422|en|422|WD=Q30906|lt=422|1=422}} {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27|1=June 27}}) – Emperor Wu of the Southern Song (【劉裕】), the first Emperor of the Song dynasty (born {{ill|356|en|356|WD=Q47937|lt=356|1=356}}). * Shōkyō 2nd year / year / Genkō 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333|1=1333}} {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|WD=Q2698|lt=July Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tengyō|en|Tengyō|qid=Q1327340|lt=Tenkei|1=Tengyō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|938|en|938|qid=Q24794|lt=938|1=938}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|qid=Q2663|lt=June 22|1=June 22}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Jōhei|en|Jōhei|qid=Q1324874|lt=Shōhei|1=Jōhei}} to {{ill|Tengyō|en|Tengyō|qid=Q1327340|lt=Tenkei|1=Tengyō}}. * {{ill|Shōkyō|en|Shōkyō|qid=Q1069086|lt=Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō|en|Genkō|qid=Q844859|lt=Genkō|1=Genkō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|qid=Q6004|lt=1333|1=1333}} {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|qid=Q2698|lt=July 4|1=July 4}}) – The Kamakura shogunate was overthrown when [[Nitta Yoshisada]] attacked Kamakura, forcing about 800 members of the {{ill|Later Hōjō clan|en|Later Hōjō clan|qid=Q431928|lt=Later Hōjō clan|1=Later Hōjō clan}} clan, including {{ill|Hōjō Takatoki|en|Hōjō Takatoki|qid=Q2355334|lt=Hōjō Takatoshi|1=Hōjō Takatoki}}, to commit suicide.
== Births == * Genbun 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1737|en|1737|qid=Q6993|lt=1737|1=1737}} {{ill|June 20|en|June 20|qid=Q2666|lt=June 20|1=June 20}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieharu|en|Tokugawa Ieharu|qid=Q437518|lt=Tokugawa Ieharu|1=Tokugawa Ieharu}}, the 10th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died {{ill|1786|en|1786|qid=Q7760|lt=1786|1=1786}}). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|qid=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1815|en|1815|qid=Q6948|lt=1815|1=1815}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|qid=Q2659|lt=June 29|1=June 29}}) – {{ill|Asada Sōhaku|ja|浅田宗伯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asada Sōhaku|1=Asada Sōhaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6560684}}, a physician of traditional Chinese medicine and Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q125199930}}) (died {{ill|1894|en|1894|qid=Q7843|lt=1894|1=1894}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1859|en|1859|qid=Q7687|lt=1859|1=1859}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|qid=Q2663|lt=June 22|1=June 22}}) – {{ill|Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja|坪内逍遙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsubouchi Shōyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 坪内逍遥|1=Tsubouchi Shōyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q706196}}, a novelist (died {{ill|1935|en|1935|qid=Q18658|lt=1935|1=1935}}).
== Deaths == * [[Yōshō (Southern Song)|Yōshō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|422|en|422|qid=Q30906|lt=422|1=422}} {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|qid=Q2664|lt=June 27|1=June 27}}) – Emperor Wu of the Southern Song (【劉裕】), the first Emperor of the Song dynasty (born {{ill|356|en|356|qid=Q47937|lt=356|1=356}}). * Shōkyō
